case_title: O.S.COMPUTER CITY, INC. VS SHEN, MONDY DBA SUNRISE INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY O.S.COMPUTER CITY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEN, MONDY DBA SUNRISE INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO MONDY SHEN SUNRISE INT'L RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O.S.COMPUTER CITY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEN, MONDY DBA SUNRISE INTERNATIONAL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00, PLFT TO RETURN NOTE BOOKS TO DEFT ON RECEIPT OF PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
